greeting: Hello! Ask me a crop price, or send a photo of a sick plant.
fallback: I can help with crop prices and plant health. Try asking 'tomato price' or send a photo.
assisted.holding: Thanks — an agriculture officer is reviewing your question and will reply to you shortly.
price.summary: Best net price for {crop}: {price} {currency}/{unit} at {market} ({distance} km away). 7-day trend: {trend}. My advice: {reco}.
price.stale: Note: these prices are about {days} days old, so treat this as a rough guide, not a guarantee.
price.no_data: I don't have recent market prices for {crop} near you yet. An officer has been notified to add them.
price.which_crop: Which crop do you mean? For example: tomato, onion, or rice.
crop.ask_photo: Please send a clear, well-lit photo of the affected plant or leaf and I'll take a look.
crop.healthy: Good news — this plant looks healthy. Keep monitoring, and send another photo if you notice spots, wilting, or discoloration.
crop.safety: Safety: follow label dosage, wear gloves and a mask, and keep children and animals away during application.
crop.consult_officer: If symptoms spread quickly or cover more than a few plants, consult your local agriculture officer.
crop.escalate: I'm not confident enough from this photo to advise safely. I've asked an extension officer to review it. Please also send a clearer, well-lit close-up of the affected leaf.
advisory.warning: This is general guidance. Please confirm with an agriculture officer or call 0117929494.
advisory.fallback: I can give general farming guidance, but I could not prepare a detailed answer right now.
other.agriculture_only: I can help with crop prices, crop disease, and farming guidance. Please ask an agriculture question.
onboarding.consent: Your data is yours. We use it only to give you better advice, never to sell or surveil you. Do you consent?
